title: Privacy | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: HomePrivacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyLast updated: 4 January 2026Who Operates This WebsiteOperator: Defence Legal Services LtdContact email: robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukContact phone: 07535 494446Website: policestationrepuk.comWhat Data We CollectFor Representatives Who Register:Full nameEmail addressPhone numberDate of birth (private - not shown publicly)Address and postcode (private - not shown publicly)DSCC PIN number (private - not shown publicly)County and stations covered (public)Availability and accreditation type (public)Optional notes and promotional text (public if provided)For All Website Visitors:Analytics data (page views, device type, approximate location via Google Analytics)Cookies for website functionality (see our Cookies Policy)What Data Is Public vs PrivatePublicly Visible in Directory:NamePhone number and email (behind "Show Contact Details" button to prevent scraping)County and stations coveredAvailability and accreditation typeOptional notes, website URL, WhatsApp linkNever Shown Publicly:Date of birthFull address and postcodeDSCC PIN numberAny data marked "private" in your profileHow We Use Your DataWe use your data to:Display your profile in the public directoryAllow criminal defence firms to search and contact youVerify your registration detailsSend you updates about the directory (if you opted in to marketing)Improve the website and directory serviceWe will never:Sell your data to third partiesShare your private data (address, DOB, DSCC PIN) publiclyUse your data for purposes unrelated to the directoryYour Data RightsUnder UK GDPR, you have the right to:Access: Request a copy of all data we hold about youRectification: Correct inaccurate or incomplete dataErasure: Request deletion of your profile and dataRestriction: Temporarily suspend use of your dataPortability: Receive your data in a structured formatObject: Object to processing of your data for marketingHow to Request Correction or RemovalIf you are a representative and want to:Update your profile: Log in and edit via your Profile pageDelete your profile entirely: Email us at robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.uk with "Delete My Profile" in the subject lineReport inaccurate data: Email us or use the "Suggest Edit" feature on station pagesRequest a data export: Email us and we'll send you all data we hold within 30 daysResponse time: We aim to respond to all data requests within 7 working days.How Long We Keep Your DataWe retain representative profiles for as long as:Your account remains activeYou continue to use the directory serviceIf you request deletion or your account is inactive for 3+ years, we will permanently delete all your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to retain records (e.g., payment records for tax purposes are kept for 7 years).Questions About Your Data?Contact our data protection officer for any privacy concernsEmail UsCall 07535 494446
